When to use:

Upgrade to or adopt Spring Boot 4.1 features on a Boot 4.0 baseline. Use when moving from 4.0.x to 4.1.x, adding Spring gRPC, new Jackson configuration properties, HTTP client SSRF protections, OpenTelemetry updates, or Log4j file rotation.
